hallucination_controls.control_rule: Never create candidate metadata from memory or model recall.
Never convert a placeholder citation slot into a reference without retrieval evidence.
A future candidate must have a stable locator or explicit reason for rejection.

hallucination_controls.boundary_note: No source is claimed as verified.
hallucination_controls.control_rule: Retrieval alone must not be treated as source verification.
Verification alone must not be treated as acceptance for citation integration.
Acceptance alone must not modify manuscript files.

hallucination_controls.boundary_note: Source retrieval count and verified source count remain zero.
hallucination_controls.control_rule: Do not claim earlier milestones retrieved or verified sources.

hallucination_controls.boundary_note: Manuscript submission ready count remains zero.
hallucination_controls.control_rule: Even future citations must not imply submission readiness by themselves.
A schema does not close evidence gaps or validate scientific claims.

hallucination_controls.boundary_note: Future source retrieval requires a separate official milestone.
hallucination_controls.control_rule: Future retrieval, verification, and integration require separate official milestones.

ledger_fields.boundary_note: Candidate ledger schema only. No candidate source is recorded.
ledger_fields.field_purpose: Stable identifier for a future retrieval candidate.
ledger_fields.required_rule: Must remain empty until a separate source retrieval milestone creates a real candidate.

ledger_fields.field_purpose: Maps a future candidate to exactly one unresolved citation slot.
ledger_fields.required_rule: Must reference one CIT-SLOT identifier from the unresolved slot list.

ledger_fields.boundary_note: Future source retrieval requires a separate official milestone.
ledger_fields.field_purpose: Links a future candidate to an allowed query family from the retrieval gate.
ledger_fields.required_rule: Must use an allowed query family and must not introduce a new unreviewed search family.

ledger_fields.field_purpose: Stores the title of a future retrieved candidate source.
ledger_fields.required_rule: Must not be filled from memory, guesswork, placeholder text, or fabricated references.

ledger_fields.boundary_note: No source is claimed as verified.
ledger_fields.field_purpose: Stores authorship or issuing body after future retrieval.
ledger_fields.required_rule: Must remain empty until source metadata is retrieved and separately checked.

ledger_fields.field_purpose: Stores candidate publication year after future retrieval.
ledger_fields.required_rule: Must not be inferred when unavailable.

ledger_fields.field_purpose: Stores DOI, URL, database record, ISBN, or stable locator after future retrieval.
ledger_fields.required_rule: Must reject imaginary DOI records, unverifiable URLs, and placeholder locators.
Allowed values must remain within the source type enum and must not imply validation by type alone.

ledger_fields.field_purpose: States the narrow role the future source may support.
ledger_fields.required_rule: Must not support project result validation, performance claims, readiness approval, or proof.

ledger_fields.boundary_note: No real biological datasets, no real pathogen models, no receptor parameters, and no operational targeting are introduced.
ledger_fields.field_purpose: Records whether a future candidate passes safety exclusion screening.
ledger_fields.required_rule: Must reject real biological datasets, real pathogen models, receptor parameters, operational targeting, wet-lab protocols, and actionable biosafety-risk instructions.

ledger_fields.boundary_note: No source is claimed as verified.
ledger_fields.field_purpose: Records verification state after a future verification milestone.
ledger_fields.required_rule: Must remain not_verified in this milestone.

ledger_fields.boundary_note: No accepted source and no rejected source is recorded.
ledger_fields.field_purpose: Records whether a future candidate is pending, accepted, rejected, or blocked.
ledger_fields.required_rule: Must remain not_recorded in this milestone because no candidate exists.

ledger_fields.field_purpose: Records whether a future verified source has been integrated into a manuscript citation slot.
ledger_fields.required_rule: Must remain not_integrated in this milestone.

ledger_fields.field_purpose: Records whether a manuscript file was changed.
ledger_fields.required_rule: Must remain no_mutation in this milestone.

ledger_fields.boundary_note: Manuscript submission ready count remains zero.
ledger_fields.field_purpose: Records whether a candidate is being misused to imply readiness.
ledger_fields.required_rule: Must remain no_readiness_claim in this milestone.

ledger_fields.boundary_note: Future source retrieval requires a separate official milestone.
ledger_fields.field_purpose: Stores the future official milestone that authorizes retrieval, verification, or integration.
ledger_fields.required_rule: Must state that future source retrieval requires a separate official milestone.

non_readiness_disclaimer: This v8.222 artifact creates a citation retrieval candidate ledger schema only. Candidate ledger schema only. No candidate source is recorded. No retrieval authorization is granted. No source retrieval is performed. No actual citation is added. No fabricated reference is introduced. No source is claimed as verified. It does not complete citation integration, does not validate scientific claims, does not modify manuscript files, and No manuscript file is modified. No new citation is added. Future source retrieval requires a separate official milestone.

provenance_fields.boundary_note: Future source retrieval requires a separate official milestone.
provenance_fields.required_rule: Must name the future official milestone that performed source retrieval.
Must match an allowed query family and must not be invented after the fact.

provenance_fields.boundary_note: No source is claimed as verified.
provenance_fields.required_rule: Must identify the future database, index, publisher site, or stable discovery location.
Must be recorded only when a future retrieval action actually occurs.
Must state how title, author, year, and locator were captured.

provenance_fields.boundary_note: No source is claimed as verified.
provenance_fields.required_rule: Must remain not_verified until a future verification step checks the source.

provenance_fields.boundary_note: No real biological datasets and no real pathogen models are introduced.
provenance_fields.required_rule: Must record how safety exclusions were checked in a future milestone.
Must confirm that a future candidate is not used to validate results or claim readiness.
Must name the future official milestone that integrates a citation.

provenance_fields.boundary_note: No accepted source and no rejected source is recorded.
provenance_fields.required_rule: Must preserve a plain-language audit note for why a future candidate was accepted, rejected, or blocked.

safety_screen_fields.boundary_note: Real biological dataset import count remains zero.
safety_screen_fields.screen_rule: Reject candidate if it requires importing, analyzing, or operationalizing real biological datasets.

safety_screen_fields.boundary_note: Real pathogen simulation count remains zero.
safety_screen_fields.screen_rule: Reject candidate if it introduces real pathogen simulation or operational biological modeling.

safety_screen_fields.boundary_note: Real receptor parameter count remains zero.
safety_screen_fields.screen_rule: Reject candidate if it introduces receptor parameters or real receptor mechanics.

safety_screen_fields.boundary_note: Operational host targeting count and real host range prediction count remain zero.
safety_screen_fields.screen_rule: Reject candidate if it supports operational targeting, host tropism prediction, or host range prediction.
Reject candidate if it contains wet-lab protocols or actionable experimental instructions.

safety_screen_fields.boundary_note: Actionable biosafety-risk instruction count remains zero.
safety_screen_fields.screen_rule: Reject candidate if it enables actionable biosafety-risk instructions.

safety_screen_fields.boundary_note: Real-world infectivity optimization count remains zero.
safety_screen_fields.screen_rule: Reject candidate if it supports real-world infectivity optimization.

safety_screen_fields.boundary_note: Immune evasion optimization count remains zero.
safety_screen_fields.screen_rule: Reject candidate if it supports immune evasion optimization.

safety_screen_fields.boundary_note: External validation count, proof assistant verification count, and readiness approval count remain zero.
safety_screen_fields.screen_rule: Reject candidate if it is used to imply validation, proof, readiness, evidence-gap closure, or evaluation results.
Reject any use of a candidate as permission to mutate manuscript files in this milestone.

status_enums.allowed_use: Default state for candidate fields in v8.222 because no candidate source is recorded.
May describe a future ledger row only after retrieval authorization exists.
Reserved for a future retrieval milestone only.
Reserved for a future verification milestone only.
status_enums.boundary_note: No source is claimed as verified.

status_enums.allowed_use: Reserved for future accepted candidate records after retrieval and screening.
Reserved for future rejected candidate records after retrieval and screening.
Reserved for future candidates that violate safety exclusions.
status_enums.boundary_note: Wet-lab protocol count and actionable biosafety-risk instruction count remain zero.

status_enums.allowed_use: Default citation integration state in v8.222.
status_enums.boundary_note: No new citation is added and does not complete citation integration.

title: Safe Abstract Toy Citation Retrieval Candidate Ledger Schema
